name: direct-para-overrides-conditional
description: Table with firstRow conditional pPr jc=center. Cell (0,0) has direct paragraph alignment=right.
expected_behavior: Cell (0,0) paragraph: direct right overrides conditional center -> Right. Cell (0,1) paragraph: no direct, gets conditional -> Center. Data rows: no conditional alignment.
current_status: GAP — code unconditionally sets para.align from conditional
